name: Good Grants API
description: The Good Grants API allows you to list, get, create, update, delete and upload many different resources within the Good Grants grant management platform. Resources include accounts, applications, allocations, categories, chapters, contributors, documents, fields, forms, funds, payments, rounds, seasons, users, webhooks, and more.
